title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 238.020 - Compact, when binding, where filed
text:
238.020.  Compact, when binding, where filed. — The compact when signed by the signatories of each state as herein provided shall become binding upon the state of Missouri and shall be filed in the office of the secretary of state of Missouri.
(L. 1965 p. 376 § 2)
